page_metadata.biotools__summary: A new information theoretic method to identify multivariate statistical dependencies between a transcription factor and one or more of its targets, conditional on the presence (or absence) of a candidate modulator gene.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A new information theoretic method to identify multivariate statistical dependencies between a transcription factor and one or more of its targets, conditional on the presence (or absence) of a candidate modulator gene.
